'''âr-ng-z''' ('''karangaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whizz|whizz]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whizz|whizz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-ng-z
|-
! Lemma
| karangaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirangaz|thirangaz]] || [[word:jirangaz|jirangaz]] || [[word:shirangaz|shirangaz]] || [[word:kirangaz|kirangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurangaz|thuthurangaz]] || [[word:jujurangaz|jujurangaz]] || [[word:shushurangaz|shushurangaz]] || [[word:kukurangaz|kukurangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurangaz|thurangaz]] || [[word:jurangaz|jurangaz]] || [[word:shurangaz|shurangaz]] || [[word:kurangaz|kurangaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurangaz|thurangaz]] || [[word:jurangaz|jurangaz]] || [[word:shurangaz|shurangaz]] || [[word:kurangaz|kurangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therangaz|therangaz]] || [[word:jerangaz|jerangaz]] || [[word:sherangaz|sherangaz]] || [[word:kerangaz|kerangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorangaz|thothorangaz]] || [[word:jojorangaz|jojorangaz]] || [[word:shoshorangaz|shoshorangaz]] || [[word:kokorangaz|kokorangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorangaz|thorangaz]] || [[word:jorangaz|jorangaz]] || [[word:shorangaz|shorangaz]] || [[word:korangaz|korangaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorangaz|thorangaz]] || [[word:jorangaz|jorangaz]] || [[word:shorangaz|shorangaz]] || [[word:korangaz|korangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrangaz|thĂŠrangaz]] || [[word:jĂŠrangaz|jĂŠrangaz]] || [[word:shĂŠrangaz|shĂŠrangaz]] || [[word:kĂŠrangaz|kĂŠrangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharangaz|thatharangaz]] || [[word:jajarangaz|jajarangaz]] || [[word:shasharangaz|shasharangaz]] || [[word:kakarangaz|kakarangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharangaz|tharangaz]] || [[word:jarangaz|jarangaz]] || [[word:sharangaz|sharangaz]] || [[word:karangaz|karangaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharangaz|tharangaz]] || [[word:jarangaz|jarangaz]] || [[word:sharangaz|sharangaz]] || [[word:karangaz|karangaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharangaz|sharangaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharangaz|gosharangaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharangaz|gokisharangaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharangaznĂŒ|sharangaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharangaznknĂŒ|gosharangaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangaznĂŒ|gokisharangaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharangazshĂ«|sharangazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharangaznkshĂ«|gosharangaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharangazshĂ«|gokisharangazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangazro|sharangazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangaznkro|gosharangaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangazro|gokisharangazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangazmu|sharangazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangaznkmu|gosharangaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangazmu|gokisharangazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharangazsher|sharangazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharangaznksher|gosharangaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharangazsher|gokisharangazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharangazng|sharangazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharangaznkng|gosharangaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharangazng|gokisharangazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharangazya|sharangazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharangaznkya|gosharangaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharangazya|gokisharangazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharangazyam|sharangazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharangaznkyam|gosharangaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharangazyam|gokisharangazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangaznĂŒshĂ«|sharangaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangaznknĂŒshĂ«|gosharangaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangaznĂŒshĂ«|gokisharangaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangaznĂŒro|sharangaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangaznknĂŒro|gosharangaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangaznĂŒro|gokisharangaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangaznĂŒmu|sharangaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangaznknĂŒmu|gosharangaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangaznĂŒmu|gokisharangaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangazshĂ«nĂŒ|sharangazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharangaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharangazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangazshĂ«ro|sharangazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangaznkshĂ«ro|gosharangaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangazshĂ«ro|gokisharangazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangazshĂ«mu|sharangazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangaznkshĂ«mu|gosharangaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangazshĂ«mu|gokisharangazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangazronĂŒ|sharangazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangaznkronĂŒ|gosharangaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangazronĂŒ|gokisharangazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangazroshĂ«|sharangazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangaznkroshĂ«|gosharangaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangazroshĂ«|gokisharangazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharangazromu|sharangazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharangaznkromu|gosharangaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharangazromu|gokisharangazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharangazmunĂŒ|sharangazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharangaznkmunĂŒ|gosharangaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharangazmunĂŒ|gokisharangazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharangazmushĂ«|sharangazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharangaznkmushĂ«|gosharangaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharangazmushĂ«|gokisharangazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharangazmuro|sharangazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharangaznkmuro|gosharangaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharangazmuro|gokisharangazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
